summary: Annotate events tour + events watchlist save with pp:no-error-path-probe: their bad-input path can't return a non-zero exit (Ticketmaster returns 200+empty for unknown attraction ids; save's no-arg shows help), so live-dogfood's error_path probe must skip them.
reason: Both novels use the help-on-no-args pattern and cannot distinguish invalid input from an empty result, so an error_path probe expecting a non-zero exit fails against real behavior. The annotation is the skill's sanctioned way to skip that probe for such commands.
validated_outcome: live dogfood --level full 142/142 pass after annotation.
